Hero.subtitle: Unforgettable trips to the world's most beautiful corners and reliable visa support. Your adventure starts here.

Services.title: The best choice for planning your dream trip
Services.subtitle: We provide services to ensure your every moment is perfect. We take care of visa processes, tickets, hotels.
Services.visaDesc: We provide professional assistance in all processes from document preparation to interviews.
Services.toursDesc: We have exclusive contracts with the world's best hotels and airlines.
Services.safeDesc: Feel at peace with 24/7 support and insurance services during your trip.

dummyData.overviewTemplate: An unforgettable trip to {tourName} awaits you! With this tour package, you will discover the most amazing highlights of {category}. Cozy hotels, professional guides, and a special itinerary will ensure your holiday is at the highest level. Create memories of a lifetime for yourself and your loved ones! Our years of experience will give you the best moments of relaxation.

hotel1.name: Premium Plaza Hotel & Spa
hotel1.desc: Premium class hotel located in the city center with all amenities. There is a spa center, swimming pool, and 3 restaurants.

hotel2.name: Grand Horizon Resort
hotel2.desc: An amazing place in the heart of nature in a quiet area. Mainly suitable for those who want a quiet holiday.

Testimonials.title: Happy Travel Experiences
Testimonials.subtitle: Get to know the amazing impressions of hundreds of our satisfied clients who have reached their dream destinations with us.

1.text: I got my USA visa with the help of My Dream Travel and had an amazing trip. Thank you so much!

2.text: Traveling across Europe was my dream. They processed the visas and tour packages quickly and without problems.

3.text: Vacationing in Dubai was a completely different experience. I recommend My Dream Consulting to everyone.

Footer.about: Our goal is to provide an unforgettable and safe travel experience for each of our clients.
